sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22991" key="gumnoperi/bolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γυμνο-περίβολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bare of coverings,</tr_> epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Γυμνοσοφισταί,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
